question:
A portable tank differs from a cargo tank in that ______.
1) Cargo tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle
2) None of these
3) Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle
4) Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are permanently attached to a vehicle
canonical_answer: Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.answer: Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Portable tanks are bulk containers, which are not permanently attached to a vehicle
